validation_sets.use: final independent check before any full candidate conclusion

policy_rules: Repeatedly used stress casebook and historical diagnostics must be tagged development or diagnostic.
No final holdout can be selected after looking at candidate results.
Full-backfill admission requires mini-backfill gate pass and scorecard frozen before execution.
Validation PASS is not a research result PASS.

reader_brief.summary: 统计验证策略已冻结；已用诊断窗口不能再作为最终独立 holdout。
reader_brief.blocking_issues: actual untouched holdout dates must be preserved in research_window_catalog before full-backfill.
reader_brief.warnings: development/diagnostic results can guide redesign but cannot be final proof.
